_comment: Spec 016 CEO-review decision 6 / Acceptance — the EXACT PipelineEvent field set that careersystems' tracker-import consumes. enqueueManualCapture() must emit precisely these keys (no recovered_html, no source, no debug). Cross-repo verification of the pipeline/jobsearch state machines is out of band. `date` is asserted by format, not value (it is today's date at capture time).
